title: Peppery Juicy Chinese Pork Dumplings
description: Peppery and juicy pork dumplings bursting with aromatic onion and pepper, a nostalgic comfort dish thats dairyfree and perfect for any meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl combine ground pork, shredded cabbage, diced scallions, minced garlic and ginger, soy sauce, Shaoxing wine, sesame oil, black pepper, and salt; mix thoroughly until the filling is well incorporated and a sticky consistency forms.

Lay a dumpling wrapper flat on a clean surface. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the pork mixture into the center of the wrapper. Fold the wrapper in half, pinch the edges together, and crimp to seal. Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a rolling boil. Carefully drop dumplings in batches, stirring gently to prevent sticking. Cook for 6-8 minutes, or until the wrappers turn translucent and the pork is cooked through.

Remove dumplings with a slotted spoon and set aside on a parchment-lined plate. Serve hot, accompanied by a dipping sauce of soy sauce, rice vinegar, minced garlic, and a sprinkle of extra black pepper.
